info.name: template-service
info.description:
REST API for retrieving and rendering notification templates.

Base URL: {{template_service_url}} (default: http://localhost:8002)

request.description:
Retrieves all templates in the database.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": "tpl-welcome",
    "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
    "name": "Welcome Email",
    "subject": "Welcome {{userName}}!",
    "body": "Hello {{userName}},\n\nYour account {{accountId}} has been credited with ${{amount}}.",
    "version": 1,
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00Z"
  }
]
```

Retrieves a template by ID without rendering.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "id": "tpl-welcome",
  "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
  "name": "Welcome Email",
  "subject": "Welcome {{userName}}!",
  "body": "Hello {{userName}},\n\nYour account {{accountId}} has been credited with ${{amount}}.",
  "version": 1,
  "active": true,
  "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00Z"
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.

Retrieves a template and renders it with the provided payload.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "templateId": "tpl-welcome",
  "content": "Hello Alice,\n\nYour account ACC-12345 has been credited with $250.00."
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.
Response (400): Invalid payload.

Checks whether a template exists and is active.

HTTP 200: Template exists and is active.
HTTP 404: Template not found or inactive.
